info.name: Curriculum Management System API (Complete)
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Curriculum Management System.

## 🚀 Setup Instructions:

1. **Import** this collection into Postman.
2. **Login** to your app in the browser.
3. **Get Session Cookie**:
    - F12 > Application > Cookies > Copy `laravel_session` value.
    - In Postman, click **Cookies** link (below Send button) > Add Domain `127.0.0.1` > Add Cookie `laravel_session=<value>`.
4. **Get CSRF Token**:
    - Run the `GET CSRF Token` request in the **Auth & Helpers** folder.
    - Copy the token value.
    - Click **Top Level Collection Name** > **Variables** tab.
    - Paste token into `csrf_token` CURRENT VALUE.
5. **Save** and start listing requests!

body.raw:
{
    "curriculum": "Bachelor of Science in Computer Science",
    "programCode": "BSCS",
    "academicYear": "2024-2025",
    "yearLevel": "College",
    "compliance": "CHED",
    "memorandumYear": "2017",
    "memorandum": "CMO No. 25"
}
